title: Dockerfile and Compose Validation, Image Tests, Fault Injection, and Quality Gates · Runtime and Build Recall
summary: An operations reviewer reconstructs dockerfile and compose validation, image tests, fault injection, and quality gates from delayed evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and extends the container release test and fault matrix under a changed constraint. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for container release test and fault matrix after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defens…
objectives: Run Dockerfile syntax and build checks, policy lint, warnings-as-errors, and negative fixtures without treating style as behavior proof.
Validate canonical Compose configuration, profiles, variables, images, networks, dependency conditions, implementation support, and changed overrides.
Test default user, entrypoint, arguments, files, permissions, labels, health, ports, signals, filesystem mutability, and exit behavior from the built image.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# docker-basics cumulative container delivery portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never connect to a Docker daemon, mount a socket, or execute learner commands.
workspace: docker
version-baseline:
  engine: 29.6.1
  compose: 5.3.1
  buildx: 0.35.0
  buildkit: 0.31.1
  dockerfile-frontend: 1.25
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Docker Build Checks Lint · changed case · Review Docker Build Checks Lint
steps.instruction:
review case — A review image builds and answers one happy-path request but fails read-only execution, slow dependency startup, SIGTERM, missing secrets, and clean-host pull. Design layered tests plus deterministic teardown. Competency probe: Run Dockerfile syntax and build checks, policy lint, warnings-as-errors, and negative fixtures without treating style as behavior proof.

Which action demonstrates Docker Build Checks Lint without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Docker Build Checks Lint · changed case · Review Docker Build Checks Lint.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for run dockerfile syntax and build checks, policy lint, warnings-as-errors, and negative fixtures without treating style as behavior proof. For Docker Build Checks Lint · changed case · Review Docker Build Checks Lint, keep Docker Build Checks Lint connected to mechanically reviewable Docker artifact and transfer evidence.
